Sign inEnter to win

AMOE · Free entry by mail

Yes, the free entry is really free.

US sweepstakes law requires it, and we mean it: a postcard counts exactly the same as a paid entry. One postcard, one entry, same odds.

How it works in 3 steps.

Get a postcard.

Any 3"×5" postcard works. Blank or with a picture, your choice.

Write 5 things on it.

Your name, address, email, phone, and the Sweepstakes ID (#1 for the MSC cruise).

Mail it to this address.

We process within 3 business days and email your entry confirmation.

Mail your postcard to:

Gaviom Sweepstakes, Free Entry PO Box 4218 Wilmington, DE 19801

Allow 7–10 business days for the postcard to arrive. We add your entry the day we receive it.

[FREE ENTRY, Sweepstakes #1] Front side: Gaviom Sweepstakes, Free Entry PO Box 4218 Wilmington, DE 19801 Back side: Full name: Marcus Thompson Address: 1234 Pine St, Denver CO 80202 Email: marcus.t@email.com Phone: (303) 555-0182 Sweepstakes ID: #1

What we need

  • ✓One postcard per sweepstakes per person per promotion period (see Official Rules)
  • ✓The Sweepstakes ID number (find it on the prize page)
  • ✓Your real phone, that's how we call you if you win
  • ✓A US return address, required for the prize if you win

Lost your sweepstakes ID? It's the number shown next to the prize title (e.g. #1).

Don't want to find a postcard?

Submit a free entry online instead.

Same legal effect. We require one extra step to make sure each free entry is from a real person.

hCaptcha · I'm not a robot

We email confirmation within 24 hours.

Questions about free entry.

Can I send multiple postcards for the same sweepstakes?

No. One free entry per person per sweepstakes. Duplicates are discarded automatically.

Does my free entry really have the same odds?

Yes. All entries, paid, bundled, subscription, and free, go into a single draw pool.

How will I know my postcard arrived?

You'll get a confirmation email within 3 business days of receipt. If you don't, contact us at amoe@gaviom.com.

Can I do this from outside the US?

Free entry by mail is only available to US legal residents (18+) in eligible states.

Want to skip the wait?

Pre-sale is open. A paid entry takes 60 seconds and counts toward Draw #1 in July.

Mail in instead Enter now from $12
G Gaviom

A new US sweepstakes platform. Free entry required by law, same odds as paid entries.
